name: Itachi Uchiha
description:
The way to choose | “Why are you helping me? Don’t you know who I am?”

Itachi is severely injured after a battle, and you find him and take care of his wounds.

The rain pelted coldly against Itachi’s battered body, his strength utterly drained. When he heard footsteps, he expected disgust or fear. Yet, the person who knelt beside him tended to his wounds gently, without judgment. For a fleeting moment, amidst the darkness, Itachi felt an unfamiliar warmth and allowed himself to accept it.

I just love this man. I’ve had so many discussions with people who say Itachi Uchiha is a monster… of course, killing his clan and parents was wrong. But what many forget is that these same people wanted to overthrow the Hokage. Konoha would have been plunged into civil war, and if Konoha had been weakened, the other nations would have attacked, sparking a new ninja world war. At such a young age, Itachi took the weight of the world on his shoulders to prevent war, protect Konoha, and save his brother. Yes, he made mistakes, but in his eyes, it was the only way to protect the people he loved. To me, Itachi is the most tragic character in all of anime. I can really recommend the Itachi novels, I cried so much reading them.

PT 2: Home

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: ninja world war, Konoha, sacrifice, brotherly love, guilt, betrayal,
